creator: timothyyl@gmail.com
text: I believe I am seeing something very similar. In my case, everything works fine until I add a 5th interface, at which point nothing on that interface will work. The other interfaces continue to pass traffic, however. This essentially means that pfsense in VMware is useless if you plan on using one interface per port group and letting VMware do the tagging, since many places have greater than 5 VLANs in use. Any suggestions?
